mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS position_id, p.name AS position_name, p.quota, p.assigned_count, p.required_hours, COUNT(DISTINCT pt.tag_id) AS required_tag_count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.name ORDER BY t.name SEPARATOR ',') AS required_tags FROM `position` p LEFT JOIN position_tag pt ON pt.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE p.id = #{positionId} AND p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.quota, p.assigned_count, p.required_hours

SELECT r.id AS registration_id, r.user_id, u.real_name, u.student_id, u.total_hours, COUNT(DISTINCT pt.tag_id) AS required_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ut_match.tag_id IS NOT NULL THEN pt.tag_id END) AS matched_count, (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ut_match.tag_id IS NOT NULL THEN pt.tag_id END) + IF(u.total_hours >= p.required_hours, 1, 0)) AS match_score, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t_all.name ORDER BY t_all.name SEPARATOR ',') AS volunteer_tags FROM `position` p INNER JOIN registration r ON r.activity_id = p.activity_id AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = r.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 LEFT JOIN position_tag pt ON pt.position_id = p.id -- 取志愿者命中的需求标签（交集） LEFT JOIN user_tag ut_match ON ut_match.user_id = r.user_id AND ut_match.tag_id = pt.tag_id -- 取志愿者全部技能标签（用于展示） LEFT JOIN user_tag ut_all ON ut_all.user_id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN tag t_all ON t_all.id = ut_all.tag_id AND t_all.category = 'SKILL' WHERE p.id = #{positionId} AND p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY r.id, r.user_id, u.real_name, u.student_id, u.total_hours, p.required_hours ORDER BY match_score DESC, u.total_hours DESC
